title: 1985 Denver Mini Classic, Boys 10 - 11, Stage 1 Prologue Time Trial

enrichment.summary: A recording from the 1985 Denver Mini Classic bicycle race, Boys 10-11 age group, Stage 1 Prologue Time Trial held June 8, 1985 at Indian Park. A commentator narrates riders including Kyle completing a hilly time trial course with a headwind.
